description_long: An adult male is depicted standing with his legs close together and his right hand resting thoughtfully on his chin, while his left arm is crossed over his torso. He is dressed in a casual, loose-fitting button-up shirt over a t-shirt, paired with straight-cut jeans and slip-on shoes. His facial expression appears contemplative, and his head is slightly tilted downward. The figure's hair is short and wavy, and his overall build is average. The clothing drapes naturally, with visible folds and creases, and the shoes have a simple, utilitarian design. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the posture suggests a moment of pause or reflection.
description: A casually dressed adult male stands thoughtfully with one hand on his chin and the other arm crossed, wearing a button-up shirt, jeans, and slip-on shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial expression, hand on chin, and crossed arm posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, bent arm, and relaxed stance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, jeans, and hair, with arms folded across the torso.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the thoughtful pose and the side profile of the head and body.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt over a t-shirt and straight-cut jeans
attribute_posture: standing with one hand on chin and the other arm crossed
